_comment: This file is the live database for Nucleus Consultant website. Admin panel writes here via GitHub API. All pages fetch this on load. Do not edit manually.
hp_hero_line3: It Is Stuck Because of Thinking.
hp_hero_sub: We transform the way leaders think, teams behave, and businesses grow — by aligning mindset, culture, and systems.
hp_pain_title: If This Feels Familiar… You're Not Alone
hp_pain_bullets:
Team is not taking ownership
Sales is inconsistent
Growth feels unpredictable
You are stuck in daily firefighting
Everything depends on you
hp_philosophy: We don't believe in controlling people. We believe in building people who don't need control.
about_hero_title: We rebuild businesses by rebuilding leaders.
about_hero_subtitle: A premium transformation consultancy for SMEs. We don't just give strategy; we align mindset, culture, and systems to engineer predictable growth.
about_who_body_1: Nucleus was founded on a simple realization: most businesses don't fail because of lack of effort — they fail because of lack of clarity, systems, and aligned thinking.
about_who_body_2: We operate as an elite extension of your leadership team, bringing structured thinking, proven frameworks, and deep human understanding to everything we do.
about_vision_text: To be the catalyst that transforms Indian SMEs into self-sustaining, high-performance organizations.
about_mission_text: To empower founders with absolute clarity on strategy, systems, and people — so their businesses grow without them.
svc_hero_title: We Don't Sell Services. We Deliver Transformation.
svc_hero_sub: Every engagement is custom-scoped to your exact business reality. No templates. No copy-paste solutions.
contact_address: 811, International Finance Center (IFC), Opp. Fire Station, VIP Road, Vesu, Surat – 395007

programs.name: Be Extraordinary
programs.desc: A transformational program for young minds and professionals to discover purpose, build confidence, and unlock their potential.

programs.name: Business Excellence
programs.desc: A deep-dive consulting program for SME owners to build systems, align teams, and create predictable growth.

programs.name: Sales Mastery
programs.desc: Practical sales training that transforms teams from order-takers to consultative sellers.

programs.name: Outbound Training
programs.desc: On-site and outdoor team-building and leadership programs for corporate teams.

services.title: Leadership & Thinking
services.desc: Transform how founders and leaders think, decide, and show up.

services.title: Culture & Accountability
services.desc: Build a culture where people own their work without being chased.

services.title: Sales & Growth System
services.desc: Install a repeatable, scalable sales process from prospecting to closing.

services.title: Operations & SOP Systems
services.desc: Document, delegate, and systematize your business operations.

services.title: Marketing & Brand Positioning
services.desc: Build a brand that attracts the right clients automatically.

services.title: HR & People Development
services.desc: Hire right, develop faster, retain longer.

footer_tagline: Transforming inner light into outer impact.
